name: codex-with-cc-plus
description: A Codex plugin for delegated Claude Code execution, OpenAI-compatible report workers, and artifact-grounded run supervision.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plugin for Claude Code delegation, report workers, and run supervision.
interface.longDescription: Routes Codex main thread planning into staged Codex child-agent execution, Claude Code CLI implementation, OpenAI-compatible report workers, tracked speckit specs, and artifact-grounded Run Supervisor feedback. The repository is self-indexed for Codex plugin installation through its bundled .agents/plugins/marketplace.json manifest.
defaultPrompt: Use the codex-with-cc-plus workflow to delegate child-agent implementation through Claude Code CLI and observe long runs with Run Supervisor artifacts.
Review this repository and explain how Codex main thread planning flows into Dispatch Planner, TaskFiles, Run Supervisor, and deterministic verifier gates.
Add shaoqing404/codex_with_cc_plus as a Codex plugin marketplace, then install codex-with-cc-plus@codex-with-cc-plus for user scope.
